history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A woman in a black hijab and athletic wear is performing dumbbell exercises in a modern gym. She's facing away from the camera, holding a dumbbell in each hand, with one slightly raised. The gym features a vibrant purple floor and purple LED strip lighting along the ceiling and walls. In the background, there's a rack of dumbbells, aerial yoga hammocks hanging from the ceiling, and a large screen displaying a group of people. The overall mood is energetic and focused, with a cool, modern aesthetic created by the purple lighting and sleek gym equipment.
